use_codes.desc: RELIEF OF SIGNS AND SYMPTOMS OF RHEUMATOID ARTHRITIS AND OSTEOARTHRITIS AND TO DECREASE RISK OF DEVELOPING UPPER GASTROINTESTINAL ULCERS IN PATIENTS WHO ARE TAKING IBUPROFEN FOR THOSE INDICATIONS
